enum CompilerPlatform {
  LINUX = "linux-amd64",
  LINUX_ARM64 = "linux-arm64",
  WINDOWS = "windows-amd64",
  MACOS = "macosx-amd64",
  WASM = "wasm",
}

return result
    .toArray()
    .map((x) =>
      typeof x === "object" && x !== null && "toArray" in x
        ? resultToArray(x)
        : x,
    );
